message:
Document --run-skipped CLI flag (#209)

* Document --run-skipped CLI flag

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Trim --run-skipped guide section

files.patch:
@@ -125,6 +125,14 @@ quiet; the final result line includes `attempts=3/3` (or the actual number on a
 success). Use this as a guardrail while you investigate the underlying flake and
 keep the budget small to avoid masking issues.
 
+## Override skip configuration
+
+Pass `--run-skipped` to ignore all skip configuration and execute skipped tests:
+
+```sh
+uvx tenzir-test --run-skipped -m mysql
+```
+
 ## Run multiple projects
 
 Large organisations often split tests across several repositories but still want

@@ -157,6 +157,12 @@ Useful options:
   significantly reducing noise for large test suites. Verbose mode displays
   passing and skipped tests alongside failures. Use `--summary` together with
   `--verbose` to include the tree summary at the end of the run.
+- `--run-skipped`: Ignore all skip configuration and execute tests
+  normally. Both static skips (`skip: reason`) and conditional skips
+  (`skip: {on: fixture-unavailable}`) are bypassed. When a fixture raises
+  `FixtureUnavailable` and `--run-skipped` is active, the exception
+  propagates as a hard failure instead of being caught. This is useful for
+  verifying that skipped tests still compile and run correctly.
 - `-a`, `--all-projects`: Run the root project together with any satellites
   provided on the command line.
 - `-m`, `--match`: Select tests whose relative path matches a substring or glob
